component.name: Tesla Lightshow Visualizer
component.summary: High-fidelity 3D visualizer for Tesla custom lightshows

description.p: Tesla Lightshow Visualizer is a 3D application designed to preview and test custom Tesla Lightshow (.fseq) files. It features accurate 3D models of the Tesla Model S and Cybertruck with realistic lighting, smooth animations, and native ramping support.

ul.li: Experimental support for Model S and Cybertruck
Custom shaders for realistic stainless steel finish on Cybertruck
Interactive 3D view with camera controls and Day/Night modes
Debug mode with physical light markers and manual channel testing

screenshot.caption: The visualizer showing a Tesla Cybertruck in night mode

description.p: Initial release with Model S and Cybertruck support.
